message.body: oh right you are making full properly-edited vid for m2
I’m gonna read some of that one vn.
oh boy, things i'm awake for
this is not the max stream experience
"we got there once, i know how it works" type of deal
i'm mentally counting this as my k2w practice
i like that everyone does right side flandre
i tried middle considering it's mirrored but god i could not find a good gap
nah i always did right side first clear
tried middle for reclear and wow
as long as it's not a 2 bullet gustav
opanker when are you joining us
damn that sucks to hear, hope you get it sorted soon
to do runs I would need to start a new save, and I don't want to do that before being done with 100%
ok i stand by my pre-statement
i've got like 5 different saves for this
thankfully not hard to back up, just an app data thing
because then I'm just going to switch between both and it's going to discourage me from both doing runs and grinding Abyss
not played it for a while
well that is bad news for the pre FM speedruns
not looking good that you beat us in the race right now
pretty sure good for corner 1 is bad for 2
but sometimes you clip the wall on the way down
yeah god phase is so hard
oh you go left side, interesting
i just can't read regardless lol
i don't like that you and max jump for pochi final
that attack is a little stupid
btw it kinda sounds like you're eating the mic
figured i'd mention it as new setup but fair if you know
nice strat for the raised gate lol
gate diagonals with bad align are genuinely terrible
why was there a save right by the warp?
i hope your health problems get better soon
yeah i actually meant how your jogging has been lately
yeah im shocked theres multiple ppl running it lmfao
well og k2 was a rough time too
@Skulldude_ well i couldn't run it solo at FM
not so much back when people were running it
redire was complaining about geezer in my chat lol
ive seen ppl complain about everything in k2 or k3 at some point, its never the case you'll have a section that someones never shit on before lol
honestly i feel like k2w is less chopped than k2
man i gotta read that soon
im still the only idiot i know whos watched the anime, hasn't watched after story and never read the vn either
yeah its like the same way higurashi or f/sn got adapted
i think it was even deen who did it too
i hate when the ice cream man messes with me and gives me a snow flake
you shouldn't pray to god here, you need to pray to something higher
that is truly some of the worst rng i think i've seen in any fangame
like it wasn't just "oh no these 5 bullets made a wall"
was there a chance to get past?
the answer was to have the fastest reaction times known to man holy crap
no fucking reaction time would have saved you there
i literally just got home, and turned on my pc
clicked on your stream and 5 seconds later i see that
i just needed a screenshot of that saved in the group chat
theo PLEASE look in the i wanna channel
we always said she was a wall in casual play
didn't realise how literal that wall was
I started the next route but my legs are killing me so x.x
are you only allowed to read while walking on a conveyor or something??
who are u talking to lol
its cos of the back stuff right theo?
it extends to fucking up your legs too
ok that makes a bit more sense in how sitting while reading is a problem
i mean, that def seems like the trade off to take
idk head pain is up there
the leg pain is worse than my back pain ever was and I still have back pain sometimes so
honestly just inherent pain in general is just so ass
I mean they fucked up the surgery :p
sent the clip to redire too btw, we'll get a reply in 3-5 business days
can't believe dude is touring russia
i managed to hit a 4:50 stage 2 yesterday which is kinda dastardly
its my time to shine in the FM
i mean you got a very solid stage 2 coming up here
unless you die to the evil save
ok so max gets stage 2, pluto gets stage 6, and i get big kid
get it because it's the cold stage
but then what about when he enters a volcano
more people should wear capes I think
although he's called a kid, not a child
it's a good thing two children don't explode
just ignore that one screen in stage 4
i'm not sure the other kid explodes there
the one phase in last tis except it kills you instead of free
influka is just a killer bro
the curving it the most mild one out of all of these which is something
yeah it uses an alternate song too
max had certainly had some garbage explosions, but yours was on another level
that thing wanted her dead so bad it had WAVES to it
i was already worried but now i've been given confirmation it's so over
i think we're all aware of the "balance" this game has
the theme for todays stream is:
i used to but i stopped
i don't forget as much now
it's just the fake block would keep getting me in first playthrough
max had some pretty ass rng here recently
is there a corner in this in k2?
i swear i remember a corner
i dont think ive seen that one before
It is what it is sometimes
wait you go over that? i thought youre meant to go under
i thought theres fake blocks under
like you make the spike go up and then go under
i did read gorilla at first
dunno how i feel about center strat for that attack
i still don't know if ledge or not ledge is the better play
oh right do you know about the 5f hold right strat for the last drop?
if you're doing the first diagonal without djump anyway
basically you 5f the tbone, then don't djump
this screen is so hard man
caps lock cancelling won't help you there
3 business days is faster than i realised
yeah but we’re so back now
that is the scary jump admittedly
I heard it's more effective if you do it before sleeping
desti classic, i had something similar
did u have ur 5 hour energy
k2 isn't great in a speedrun context
i love that if you start purple in the corner, and you tap well, you never have to cross over
which also doesn't surprise me why so many people dislike it
i really wish this fight was more interesting
like just imagine if it still had the red bouncing fruit
post-kill is neat and all, but we've already learned that lesson from k3
Isn't the whole game lessons from k3
you'd think, and yet here's crimson
yeah at least this is still better than k3 crimson ever was
k3 crimson was not a fun time for me
i enjoyed it but i fully get why most wouldn't
the health bar thing is just dumb
now i wonder if you can leave the boss before collecting all the energy, and if you do does it break things
yeah i would've died at least twice there
How many times have you died to the 16px there?
damn, beating my record of at least 3
it's fine i enjoyed the chase anyway
i was very tired first playthrough clearly
this first jump post flipper is so rough
i kinda hate it's not even the first time i've seen you crush that
ok but it's not over yet
ok thats not quite how i do 2 early bats
i don't think i'll be taking your advice on board
not how i do that either
yeah stage 6 is so free except for the blue on rare occasions
i swear every phase has just That One Attack
i guess i'm the k3 kid today
two streams of k2w and i'm all "OH BOY TWO STREAMS"
he went live 40 mins ago to be fair lol
exactly what i was thinking schulzer
how dare he not watch the whole thing
i think you may want to see my strat for the bullets pluto
nah it's cool, gotta get it out
sometimes it's important to have whimsy
i like ur laugh u sound like a baboon♥
dude this phase is SO hard i swear
trying to fall at the start of p3 is also by far the hardest part
damn wolsk posting the gg a little early
yeah i messed up the start of that too many times too lol
although i also think i may have been starting too far left
6 way was my bane by the end
shoutouts to dying to a single spike in the ground on one attempt lol
gg wolsk you made a meme
damn can't pick up the energy while in bed
yeah this end game is gonna be hell
that was a lot of fun
